series_metadata.series_description: File contains transcripts of ORC Chapter 119 license denial hearings including: fact finding sheets, applications, suspension or revocation orders, trial preparation records, enforcement correspondence, service of process documents, notices of suspensions of license and registrations, exhibits, and legal findings. Records were under the Department of Commerce record rentention schedule until July 1, 2004 (former Series Authorization Number 800-0272).

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in operating area final case is closed. , 30 years in record retention warehouse
